---
title: "Part salaire AMECO"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(rdbnomics)
library(tidyverse)

data <- rdb(ids = "AMECO/ALCD0/CHE.1.0.0.0.ALCD0") %>% 
  select(original_period, value) %>% 
  drop_na() %>% 
  rename(
    year = original_period,
    part_salaire_ameco = value
  ) 

glimpse(data)

data$year = as.numeric(data$year)


data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = part_salaire_ameco))+
  geom_line()

```
